login.title: Login — HiveDeploy
login.heading: Login
login.subtitle: Multi-tenant Bot Hosting Platform
login.frozen_account: Account is frozen or disabled. Please contact the administrator if you have any questions.
login.password_changed: Password changed, please log in again
login.password_reset: Password has been reset, please log in with the new password
login.alert_login_failed: Login failed, please try again later
login.network_error: Network error, please try again later

register.title: Register — HiveDeploy
register.heading: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register and get your own Bot instance
register.email_code_hint: The code is valid for 10 minutes and will be sent to the email above

reset_password.title: Reset Password — HiveDeploy
reset_password.heading: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Reset your password by verifying your registered email
reset_password.smtp_not_ready: The email service is not configured. The verification code cannot be sent. Please contact the administrator.
reset_password.email_placeholder: Enter the email used during registration
reset_password.code_valid_hint: The code is valid for 10 minutes
reset_password.send_failed: Send failed, please try again later
reset_password.network_error: Network error, please try again later

dashboard.title: Dashboard — HiveDeploy
dashboard.page_subtitle: Create instances, open services, and troubleshoot from one place
dashboard.hero_create_desc: Start with AstrBot + NapCat or AstrBot + LLOneBot. A full instance automatically prepares the panels, WebUI, and Reverse-WS connection so you can continue setup from the service panels.
dashboard.hero_expired_title: Your account has expired. Renew first.
dashboard.hero_manage_title: Open panels or check runtime status
dashboard.hero_expired_desc: Instance operations are restricted after expiry. Renew your account to continue managing services.
dashboard.hero_manage_desc: Common actions are here: open the AstrBot panel, enter the {bt_name} WebUI, or check logs and terminals for troubleshooting.
dashboard.hero_step_create_desc: Choose NapCat or LLOneBot and the system will create the paired services.
dashboard.hero_step_wait_desc: Progress appears in the creation area and entries refresh when complete.
dashboard.hero_step_panel_desc: Open AstrBot and the Bot WebUI, then check logs or terminal when needed.
dashboard.hero_step_entry_desc: The AstrBot panel and {bt_name} WebUI are the daily configuration entries.
dashboard.hero_step_tools_desc: Use logs, terminal, and file management to diagnose connection or startup issues.
dashboard.hero_step_resources_desc: Review resource usage, Reverse-WS, and flexible port settings below.
dashboard.token_not_found: Not found yet (container may have just started)
dashboard.token_first_login: Used for the first login to the {bot_type} WebUI
dashboard.no_instance_desc: You can create a full instance (AstrBot + NapCat or AstrBot + LLOneBot) with one click, or create a single service.
dashboard.no_instance_note: Note: NapCat and LLOneBot have identical functionality and cannot be deployed simultaneously.
dashboard.ws_public_ip_note: {bt_name} connects to AstrBot via public IP, independent of the internal container hostname.
dashboard.webui_init_wait: The WebUI typically initializes within 30-60 seconds. Please wait before accessing.
dashboard.auto_config_confirm: This will overwrite the AstrBot and NapCat reverse WebSocket settings and restart both containers. Continue?
dashboard.auto_config_success:
Configuration complete. AstrBot and NapCat were restarted.
WS URL: {ws_url}
dashboard.account_expired_lock: Account expired. Instance operations are restricted.
dashboard.confirm_delete_container: Are you sure you want to delete the container {name}? The data directory will be preserved.
dashboard.confirm_create_full: Are you sure you want to create a full instance (AstrBot + {bt_label})?
dashboard.confirm_rebuild_container: Are you sure you want to rebuild the container {label}? The existing container will be deleted and recreated. The data directory will be preserved.
dashboard.confirm_delete_instance: Are you sure you want to delete the instance? The containers will be destroyed (the data directory will be preserved).
dashboard.container_started_wait: The container has been started. The WebUI service typically initializes within 30-60 seconds. If you cannot access it, please wait a moment and try again.
dashboard.switch_bot_type_warning:
Switch to {target}

Please note the following consequences:

• The currently running {current} container will be stopped and deleted
• The latest {target} image will be pulled and a new container created
• The {current} data directory will remain on the server and will not be lost
• You will need to log in and configure {target} again (scan QQ, etc.)
• AstrBot is not affected and will continue to run normally

Are you sure you want to switch?
dashboard.confirm_update: The latest image will be pulled and the container rebuilt (data will not be lost). Are you sure you want to proceed?
dashboard.default_port_warning: You are modifying the following default port mappings. This will result in:
dashboard.port_affects: ⚠ {desc} will be changed to the new port
dashboard.port_conflict_warning: If the new port conflicts with other services, an "address already in use" error may occur.

profile.title: Profile Settings — HiveDeploy
profile.page_desc: Manage your account information and security settings
profile.email_code: Email Verification Code (will be sent to {email})
profile.code_validity: The code is valid for 10 minutes
profile.password_changed_notice: After changing your password, you will need to log in again
profile.invite_admin_hint: Administrators need to go to the Admin Panel to manage invite codes
profile.invite_min_days_hint: Invite codes can be generated {days} days after registration
profile.invite_no_codes: No invite codes. Click the button above to generate one.
profile.invite_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this invite code? Unused codes will also be marked as used.

renew.title: Self-Renewal — HiveDeploy
renew.page_desc: View payment information and select renewal duration
renew.renewal_closed_hint: Please contact the administrator for renewal.
renew.permanent_no_renew: Your account is permanent, no renewal needed.
renew.payment_warning: Please complete the payment before renewing. The system does not verify payment status. Renewal is at your own responsibility.
renew.invalid_days: Please enter 1-29 days, or choose 1 month
renew.confirm_renew_msg:
Confirm renewal for {duration}?

Make sure the payment is completed. The system does not verify payment status. Renewal is at your own responsibility.

If your account was previously expired, the containers will automatically restart after renewal.
renew.no_qr_hint: Please contact the administrator to add a payment QR code

files.title: File Management — HiveDeploy
files.name: Name
files.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
files.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the following items?
files.confirm_delete_warning: This action cannot be undone. Files will be deleted immediately without being moved to the recycle bin.
files.empty_folder_hint: Drag files here to upload or click the upload button
files.folder_download_hint: Folders cannot be downloaded directly. Please compress first, then download.
files.cannot_preview: This file type cannot be previewed

logs.title: Log Viewer — HiveDeploy
logs.click_to_copy_hint: Click the log area to copy all content with one click. Auto-refresh every 5 seconds (only when auto-scroll is enabled).

terminal.title: Terminal — HiveDeploy
terminal.reconnect_hint: The connection has been lost. Click the reconnect button.

admin.title: Admin Panel — HiveDeploy
admin.invite_bytes_hint: Default 8 bytes = 16 hex characters. Increase to reduce collision probability.
admin.no_instances_hint: Instances are automatically created when users are created
admin.expire_updated: Updated: {date}. Refresh the page to apply.
admin.confirm_delete_user: Are you sure you want to delete user {username} and all their instances? After deletion, the slot will be released and the user can register again.
admin.confirm_ban: Are you sure you want to ban user {username}?
admin.confirm_unban: Are you sure you want to unban user {username}?
admin.confirm_delete_invite: Are you sure you want to delete this invite code?
admin.confirm_purge_invites:
Are you sure you want to purge all used invite codes?

All used codes (including those synced from other nodes) will be deleted from the list. This does not affect already registered users.
admin.purge_done: {count} used invite codes have been purged. The page will refresh.
admin.hide_invite_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this invite code from the list? (This does not affect the usage status, the code is only removed from the list.)
admin.announcement_hint: Shown automatically to users once per day; users can reopen it from the bell in the top right.

overview.title: Server Overview — HiveDeploy
overview.page_desc: Real-time aggregation of all node data

nodes.title: Node Management — HiveDeploy
nodes.page_desc: Manage multiple server nodes and aggregate all data on the overview page
nodes.local_token_desc: Other nodes or external systems use the following token to access the /api/v1/status endpoint of this server.
nodes.regen_token_confirm: After regeneration, the old token will become invalid immediately. Configured remote nodes need to be updated manually. Are you sure you want to proceed?
nodes.no_nodes_hint_prefix: After adding remote nodes, you can view all data on the

payment.title: Payment Settings — HiveDeploy
payment.page_desc: Configure WeChat/Alipay payment QR codes, price information, and contact details
payment.enable_renewal_desc: When enabled, normal users will see the "Self-Renewal" entry in the dashboard and can choose the renewal duration (max 30 days per renewal).
payment.enable_renewal_warning: Note: The system does not verify payments. Renewal is entirely at the user's responsibility. Administrators can check this in the renewal records.
payment.price_text_label: Price Text (displayed on the renewal page)
payment.price_text_hint: Brief price description, any text is supported
payment.qr_upload_hint: It is recommended to upload a cropped square QR code image for best results
payment.instructions_section: Renewal Instructions (displayed on the user's renewal page)
payment.instructions_placeholder: Enter renewal instructions, notes, contact details...
payment.instructions_hint: Supports plain text with line breaks. Recommended: prices, payment methods, renewal steps, notes, and support contacts.
payment.social_wechat_placeholder: e.g.: WeChat ID or group QR code link
payment.social_hint: These links will be displayed at the bottom of the renewal page for easy support contact

smtp.title: Email Settings — HiveDeploy
smtp.use_tls: Use SSL/TLS (enable for port 465, disable for port 587)
smtp.renewal_notify_email: Renewal Notification Email (administrators receive notifications, separate multiple addresses with commas)
smtp.renewal_notify_hint: When a user renews their subscription, a notification will be sent to the specified addresses. Leave blank to disable.
smtp.test_email_placeholder: Address to receive the test email
smtp.test_success: Sent successfully. Please check your inbox.
smtp.reminder_text: The system sends reminders 7, 3, and 1 day(s) before expiry, as well as on the expiry date. Users must provide an email during registration and the feature must be enabled to receive notifications.

admin_renewals.title: Renewal Records — HiveDeploy
admin_renewals.page_desc: Records of user self-renewal operations for payment verification
admin_renewals.explanation_text: The system does not verify payment status. Renewal records are for reference only. Please cross-check with actual payment records. For refunds or reversal of renewals, manually adjust the expiry time in Admin Panel → User Management.

email_templates.title: Email Templates — HiveDeploy
email_templates.heading: Email Templates
email_templates.subtitle: Customize system emails with magic variables.
email_templates.confirm_fill_default: Replace current content with the default template?
email_templates.var_desc_1: Panel root URL generated from PLATFORM_HOST
email_templates.var_desc_19: Current Bot type for the user

announcement_admin.title: Announcements - HiveDeploy
announcement_admin.page_desc: Publish multiple frontend announcements with pinning, required labels, and formatted text.
